title: Yangzhou Fried Rice
description: A classic Chinese dish made with rice, vegetables, and a hint of yangzhou flavors.
instructions: Heat 1 tsp sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add vegetables and cook until they begin to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Push vegetables to one side of the wok. Crack in 2 eggs and scramble them.
Add cooked Yangzhou rice to the wok, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Stir-fry the rice with vegetables and eggs for 2-3 minutes.
Add robust soy sauce and fried shallots. Stir-fry for another minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the fried rice to a serving platter and serve immediately.
